question: Create an `Engine` class with `horsepower` (int) and `fuelType` (string). Then, design a `Car` class that demonstrates composition by containing an `Engine` object as a member.

test_cases.expected:
--- My Car Info ---
Car Make: Toyota
Car Model: Camry
Car Year: 2023
  Engine Horsepower: 203 HP
  Engine Fuel Type: Gasoline

--- Electric Car Info ---
Car Make: Tesla
Car Model: Model S
Car Year: 2024
  Engine Horsepower: 670 HP
  Engine Fuel Type: Electric

--- Sports Car Info ---
Car Make: Porsche
Car Model: 911 GT3
Car Year: 2022
  Engine Horsepower: 502 HP
  Engine Fuel Type: Premium Gasoline

driver: The main function demonstrates the class functionality by creating and displaying Car objects with different Engine configurations, showcasing a correct and well-designed implementation.
